title: Toby Ord

body:
# Toby Ord

Toby Ord is a Senior Researcher at Oxford University (currently, at the university's AI Governance Initiative, and before that at the university’s [Future of Humanity Institute](https://www.futureofhumanityinstitute.org/)). Toby has close to two decades of experience considering the impacts of AI, including advising Google Deepmind, the UK Prime Minister's office, and the UN. He is the author of [The Precipice](https://theprecipice.com/), which argues that safeguarding our future is among the most pressing and neglected issues we face. Toby also co-founded [Giving What We Can](https://www.givingwhatwecan.org/).
